commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed; this clean implementation PR only needs normal maintainer review and final check or merge validation.; Cleared: The diff only changes local parsing, pace rendering, and tests; no concrete security or supply-chain concern was found. (sha=cc22375a00ec8adda5ce77e7dfda27822c9aacca)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds explicit Ollama session and weekly window durations, enables Ollama pace rendering in the menu and CLI, and adds parser, pace text, and CLI snapshot regression coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. The changed behavior can be verified by parsing Ollama Session/Weekly usage HTML and rendering menu/CLI pace; contributor proof and source inspection cover that path, but I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this clean implementation PR only needs normal maintainer review and final check or merge validation.

target.title: Enable pace prediction for Ollama usage windows
target.body: ## Summary - Set Ollama session windows to 5 hours and weekly windows to 7 days. - Enable session and weekly pace rendering for Ollama in the menu. - Enable Ollama weekly pace rendering in the CLI. - Add regression coverage for Ollama window durations, pace text, parser behavior, and CLI snapshot output. ## Notes Ollama documents that each plan has session limits that reset every 5 hours and weekly limits that reset every 7 days: https://ollama.com/pricing This keeps the session pace allowlist explicit for now by adding Ollama alongside Codex and Claude. Longer term, session pace should probably be generalized the same way weekly pace was, so any provider with an explicit reset time and window duration can use the shared pace calculation without provider- specific gating. ## Screenshot ## CLI proof Local debug CLI from this branch: ```text == Ollama (web) == Session: 100% left [============] Resets in 3h 8m Weekly: 100% left [===========-] Pace: 12% in reserve | Expected 12% used | Lasts until reset Resets in 6d 4h Account: ``` ## Tests - swift build --product CodexBarCLI - swift test --filter OllamaUsageParserTests passed, 9 tests - swift test --filter UsagePaceTextTests passed, 11 tests - swift test --filter CLISnapshotTests passed, 24 tests - make check passed: SwiftFormat clean, SwiftLint found 0 violations - Full `swift test` rerun: failed with 7 issues in unrelated async/background suites (`ClaudeOAuthCredentialsStoreTests`, `SubprocessRunnerTests`, and `CodexManagedOpenAIWebRefreshTests`); focused Ollama/CLI checks passed.
target.author: bdamokos

commands.author: bdamokos
